sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The last action was "no_impact" - it only changed the HUD band, not the gameplay. So clicking on the magenta center again didn't do anything meaningful. I need to try something else.
Let me think about what I've learned:
1. Clicking on the ring activates it (white diamond) and moves the purple square up
2. Clicking on the purple square moves it down
3. Clicking on the bottom purple pixel activates it as a white diamond
4. Clicking on the purple square's magenta center moves it down, but only once (second click was no_impact)
Maybe I need to click on a different part of the purple square, or on the white diamond above it, or on the dark gray pixel below.
Let me try clicking on the white diamond at (28, 36) to see if that does something.
